name: 智能告警修复-菲律宾-统一平台模板

parameters.command: ssh root@10.20.10.12 'cd /root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant && set -a && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && APP_COUNTRY='"'"'ph'"'"' APP_WORKSPACE='"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' TV_API_URL='"'"'https://tv-service-alert.kuainiu.chat/alert/v2/array'"'"' TV_MENTIONS='"'"'simontang@kn.group,jiangchuanchen@kn.group'"'"' python3 core/repair_strict_7step.py'

ssh root@10.20.10.12 'cd /root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant && set -a && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && APP_COUNTRY='"'"'ph'"'"' APP_WORKSPACE='"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' TV_API_URL='"'"'https://tv-service-alert.kuainiu.chat/alert/v2/array'"'"' TV_MENTIONS='"'"'simontang@kn.group,jiangchuanchen@kn.group'"'"' python3 tools/task_execution_checker.py --task repair'
